segments.text: It's not the end of the world for Wolf, but 172, you haven't been able to kill, that feels terrible for Ouch.
I need you out, I need to start working on the next stock because I want to make it back, but there's going to be the down B, and another stock, 3.

full_text: It's not the end of the world for Wolf, but 172, you haven't been able to kill, that feels terrible for Ouch. I need you out, I need to start working on the next stock because I want to make it back, but there's going to be the down B, and another stock, 3.
